channel.title: SHOWstudio (@showstudio) public posts - Picnob
channel.description: The Home of Fashion Film & Live Fashion Broadcasting Founded by @nick_knight - Powered by RSSHub

item.title: Our next Fashion Radio guest is moving in one direction: forward.
item.description:
Our next Fashion Radio guest is moving in one direction: forward.

From intimate soul to disco-pop, her evolution has shifted the sound. Stepping into 2026 with Superbloom, she moves beyond the dancefloor into something more sensual, self-assured and fully her own.

Welcome to Fashion Radio, @jessieware.

Out this Thursday.

Edit by: @stavrosagapiou
item.author: showstudio

item.title: “Fire the Messenger." Is the second poem from my collaboration with the wonderful @sonny_hall . He and I have been working together for the last 6 ye...
item.description:
“Fire the Messenger." Is the second poem from my collaboration with the wonderful @sonny_hall . He and I have been working together for the last 6 years illustrating his poems for his forthcoming book .
We’ve created photographs, paintings, films, sculptures and recorded performances.
Firstly , huge thank you and 🤍 to @charlotteesmeknight
The edit for this film is by the wonderful @reinadal .
The beautiful music is by @mnhempenius .
The dolls house was made by Andy Tomlinson / @tomotattle .
Retouching by Mark Boyle at @epilogueinc
Hair: @soichiinagaki
Make-up: @lauradomini2
Nails: Keziah Waudby
Set Design: @tomotattle
Music: Micha Hempenius
Digital Operation: @josephcolley
Executive Production: @liberteproductions
@bendybackpanda
Production: @holliebellis
Wardrobe Coordinator: @sidoniebarton
First Photographic Assistance: @gracehodgsonphoto,
Photographic Assistance: @georgedavidread @JoeSmurt
Hair Assistance: @kojimahiroki
Make-up Assistance: @tabitharrr
Set Design Assistance: @bradleybarrettfilm @phoebeswiderska
Production Assistance: @kitty.lyons, @jaredpasamar
Production Runner: Katey Jackson
Effects Supervisor: Martin Godward @pirate_sfx
Effects Technician: Marz Irani
Firefighters: Paul Blacow Firefighter & Craig Pemberton @bells_and_two_tones
Filmed at @showstudio and @tankstudiosldn
item.author: showstudio

item.title: Open to the public from 21-26 April at the Rotonda del Pellegrini, this collaboration between @mcmworldwide and @atelierbiagetti marks MCM’s 50th ann...
item.description:
Open to the public from 21-26 April at the Rotonda del Pellegrini, this collaboration between @mcmworldwide and @atelierbiagetti marks MCM’s 50th anniversary during Milan Design Week 2026.

Set across three levels, the experience moves from research and objects to a roller-skating dance floor with a robot DJ, ending with an operatic moment under the dome.

Design, sound and space come together to create something immersive and slightly surreal - where past and future blur, and space travel becomes a way of thinking about freedom.
item.author: showstudio

item.title: Your weekly fashion newsround by @slvsareoptionl is here. Let’s get into it! Read more on SHOWstudio.com.
item.description: Your weekly fashion newsround by @slvsareoptionl is here. Let’s get into it! Read more on SHOWstudio.com.
item.author: showstudio

item.title: Final day. Friday at @080bcnfashion.
item.description:
Final day. Friday at @080bcnfashion.

Stories felt personal - shaped by lived experience, memory, identity and survival.

From @tania_marcial to @nazzalstudio × @jadmaq, @rubearth and @maisonmoonsieur, each collection spoke in its own way through materials, emotion and perspective.

Explore more on SHOWstudio.

#080BarcelonaFashion #080bcnfashionweek
item.author: showstudio

item.title: Watch the full @adidas SPZL S/S 26 film starring emerging actor @ansonboon exclusively on SHOWstudio now.
item.description:
Watch the full @adidas SPZL S/S 26 film starring emerging actor @ansonboon exclusively on SHOWstudio now.

For twelve years, adidas SPZL has been exploring the Three Stripes’ archives with @gary.aspden refining through modern materials. This season nods to adidas SPZL’s dialogue between youth culture, identity —and therefore heritage — seen through a film featuring Anson Boon.

Directed by Nick Griffiths and produced by &SON, Boon walks in atmospheric surroundings in full adidas SPZL S/S 26. The actor takes this season’s core SPZL essentials, including the Buckstead SPZL jacket, Parbold SPZL bag and Gralfy SPZL trainer from coast to coast.

#adidasspzl
item.author: showstudio

item.title: Join SHOWstudio as we take you backstage with @nazzalstudio at @080bcnfashion . Behind the Show: ‘Al-Najah | النجاة’ in collaboration with @ja...
item.description:
Join SHOWstudio as we take you backstage with @nazzalstudio at @080bcnfashion . Behind the Show: ‘Al-Najah | النجاة’ in collaboration with @jadmaq, a title meaning ‘survival’, draws from the instinctive wisdom of Bedouin life in Bilad al-Sham.

#080BarcelonaFashion #080bcnfashionweek #nazzalstudio
item.author: showstudio

item.author: showstudio

item.title: From the fashion archive: Torus (2020), directed by @nick_knight, filmed and edited by @brittlloyd_ and @raquel_couceiro_ .
item.description:
From the fashion archive: Torus (2020), directed by @nick_knight, filmed and edited by @brittlloyd_ and @raquel_couceiro_ .

First seen in @fredriktjaerandsen’s Central Saint Martins BA collection, the inflatable forms quickly took on a life beyond the runway. Developed through a live-streamed shoot with choreographer @studiowaynemcgregor, the film features performers from Studio Wayne McGregor, exploring movement, systems and connection.

It quickly took on new resonance as the COVID-19 pandemic began shortly after, reflecting on distance, perception and the ways we find connection in isolation.

Hair by @alfiesackett
Make-up by @lauradomini2
Nails by @adamslee_

Watch the full film and explore the credits on SHOWstudio.com.
item.author: showstudio

item.author: showstudio

item.title: Day 2 at @080bcnfashion and a deeper look at a new wave of designers shaping their own worlds
item.description:
Day 2 at @080bcnfashion and a deeper look at a new wave of designers shaping their own worlds

From @aaastudio___’s punk-inflected energy to @xvstrange’s cultural language and @dominnico marking ten years, the day moved through distinct creative universes, each grounded in narrative and identity

What feels especially strong this season is how the energy extends beyond the runway, with talks, workshops and live broadcasts opening parts of the programme up to the public

Special thanks to @mebarcelonahotel for hosting us in style

#080BarcelonaFashion #080BCNFashionWeek
item.author: showstudio

item.title: Back in 2007, SHOWstudio invited the world to co-create a project with Yves Saint Laurent, @stefanopilati and @nick_knight. The result was Edition24 -...
item.description:
Back in 2007, SHOWstudio invited the world to co-create a project with Yves Saint Laurent, @stefanopilati and @nick_knight. The result was Edition24 - a 24-hour portrait of the Yves Saint Laurent Woman, built from scripts submitted globally.

Starring @jessicamillerofficial, with sets by @gideonponte and narration from @thatdanstevens, each scene blends fashion, film and fragments of collective storytelling.

Film editing by @ruthhogben

Hair by @sammcknight1 Make-up by @mirandajoyce Nails by @mariannewman

Watch the full film and explore credits on SHOWstudio.com.
item.author: showstudio

item.title: Hola from Barcelona! 📍We kicked off on the ground yesterday at @080bcnfashion and here are first highlights of what we saw
item.description:
Hola from Barcelona! 📍We kicked off on the ground yesterday at @080bcnfashion and here are first highlights of what we saw

Set against the Port Vell marina, with the sea just behind the runway, this season brings together established names and new voices across 26 shows over four days

A first day featuring @maisonbolano and @adolfodominguezofficial, moving between craftsmanship and experimentation, with strong silhouettes, tactile fabrics and a predominantly dark palette, softened in moments

More to come 👋

#080BarcelonaFashion #080BCNFashionWeek
item.author: showstudio

item.title: Archive footage shot by @guybourdinofficial during a photoshoot for Charles Jourdan’s Summer 1975 collection, edited by SHOWstudio in 2003.

item.title: Leather that endures informs @dahc_dermur_viii analysing @leoprothmann processes for A/W 26. Borne from isolation in Mexico, his most personal collect...
item.description:
Leather that endures informs @dahc_dermur_viii analysing @leoprothmann processes for A/W 26. Borne from isolation in Mexico, his most personal collection offers a powerful notion of warmth to shelter our souls next season.

Experience the full collection on SHOWstudio.com

Film & edit by @edudmiguel
item.author: showstudio
